title: GainWix Desktop App
description: A full desktop application for the GainWix WhatsApp automation platform — built solo using Antigravity no-code platform with 50+ API integrations, delivered in under a week.
longDescription:
Designed and built the complete GainWix desktop application as a solo project using the Antigravity no-code platform — without writing a single line of code.

The app connects to 50+ API endpoints to deliver the full GainWix WhatsApp automation experience on desktop, including contact management, campaign creation, broadcast messaging, sequence automation, template management, and Razorpay payment integration. Built entirely by a designer with zero coding knowledge, this project showcases what's possible when design expertise meets no-code development tools.
highlights: Full desktop app built solo — zero coding knowledge
Delivered in under one week using Antigravity
